Part.Source: Event Start &HojeData = serverdate() &Cryptografado = &HTTPRequest.QueryString &Cryptografado = &Cryptografado.Replace('%2f', '/') PortalCliente.getDadosCliente.Call(&Cryptografado, &Descryptografado, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &CreCod, &CreCliCod) For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &CreCliCod if PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &PesCnpj = PesCpf &PesInsEst.Visible = 0 &PesSuf.Visible = 0 Else &PesCnpj = PesCnpj Endif &PesInsEst = PesInsEst if PesInsEst.IsEmpty() tbinsc.Visible = 0 Endif &PesSuf = PesSuf if PesSuf.IsEmpty() tbsuf.Visible = 0 Endif &PesCodRaz = PesRaz //ENDERECO &Endereco1Mensagem = PesLog.Trim() if not PesNro.IsEmpty() &Endereco1Mensagem += ', ' + PesNro.Trim() Endif &PesCep = PesCep &PesLog = PesLog &PesNro = PesNro &PesBai = PesBai &PesCpl = PesCpl &PesCidNom = PesCidNom &PesCidUfeCod = PesCidUfeCod //FATURAMENTO &PesEntCep = PesEntCep &PesEntLog = PesEntLog &PesEntNro = PesEntNro &PesEntBai = PesEntBai &PesEntCidNom = PesEntCidNom &PesEntUfeCod = PesEntUfeCod &PesEntCpl = PesEntCpl //COBRANCA &PesCobCep = PesCobCep &PesCobLog = PesCobLog &PesCobNro = PesCobNro &PesCobBai = PesCobBai &PesCobCidNom = PesCobCidNom &PesCobUfeCod = PesCobUfeCod &PesCobCpl = PesCobCpl Exit EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Cryptografado.Visible = False &Descryptografado.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False &FilCod.Visible = False &CreCod.Visible = False &CreCliCod.Visible = False &Hojedata.Visible = False GridPagas_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridPagas.InternalName GridPagas.Rows = 10 &GridPagasCurrentPage = 1 &GridPagasCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPagasPageCount = -1 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 10 &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPagasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridPagas.Rows GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh &GridPageCount = grid.PageCount &GridCurrentPage = grid.CurrentPage &GridPagasPageCount = GridPagas.PageCount &GridPagasCurrentPage = GridPagas.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPagasPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. CreDtaVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPagas.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RECIBO = "RECIBO" &grid2CreDupNro = CreDupNro &grid2CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &grid2CreDtaPrmPag = CrePagDta &grid2CreVlrDup = CreVlrDup &grid2CreBloNro = CreBloNro &grid2CreMovCod = CreMovCod &grid2CreCod = CreCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &AtualizarVencimento.Visible = (CreDtaVct < ServerDate()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &AtualizarVencimento = !'' &Imprimir = "IMPRIMIR" Do Case Case CreDtaVct < &HojeData CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case CreDtaVct < &HojeData+15 CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case CreDtaVct > &HojeData CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPagasPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPagasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridPagasCurrentPage -= 1 GridPagas.PreviousPage() Case GridPagasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridPagasCurrentPage += 1 GridPagas.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPagasPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridPagasCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridPagas.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPagasPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridPagas.Rows = GridPagasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridPagasCurrentPage = 1 GridPagas.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter do 'imprimir' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &AtualizarVencimento.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAtualizaVctAreaCliente.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Imprimir.Click areaclientepoupop.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, 'B') EndEvent Event &RECIBO.Click ValidaReciboDuplicata.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &grid2CreCod, CrePagCod) //&random = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) &SdtRecibo.Clear() &SdtReciboItem = new() &SdtReciboItem.EmpCod = &EmpCod &SdtReciboItem.RcbCreCod = &grid2CreCod &SdtReciboItem.RcbCrePagCod = CrePagCod &SdtRecibo.Add(&SdtReciboItem) &webSession.Set('ReciboImp', &sdtRecibo.ToXml()) //&DeOndeVem = 'DUPLICATA' areaclientepoupop.Popup(&EmpCod, 0, 0, 'R') // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS020.Link(&random, &DeOndeVem) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Sub 'imprimir' prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(EmpCod, 0) For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCliCod, CreDtaVct Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CreCliCod = &CreCliCod where CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA Where CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto or CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto Where CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA Where CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber Where CreVlrSdo > 0 &sdtGerarBoletoItem = new() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) EndFor if &sdtGerarBoleto.Count > 0 GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false areaclientepoupop.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, 0, 'B') // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF else msg('Nenhuma duplicata para ser impressa!') Endif EndSub
